allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\발주서 자동생성\\backend" ; $env:PYTHONPATH = "." ; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m", "uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000", "--reload" -WindowStyle Normal -PassThru | Select-Object Id)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\발주서 자동생성"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","backend.main:app","--host","0.0.0.0","--port","8000","--reload" -RedirectStandardOutput "uvicorn.log" -RedirectStandardError "uvicorn_err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health" -UseBasicParsing } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($body = @{ username = "sylee@gmail.com"; password = "admin1234!" } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; "$\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{ email = "sylee@gmail.com"; password = "admin1234!" } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; "$\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK - token:', d['access_token'][:30]+'...'\)")
